mapper.select: SELECT id, auth_provider AS authProvider, provider_user_id AS providerUserId, email, nickname, COALESCE(display_name, nickname) AS displayName, profile_image_url AS profileImageUrl, role, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, last_login_at AS lastLoginAt FROM app_user WHERE auth_provider = #{authProvider} AND provider_user_id = #{providerUserId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_user ( auth_provider, provider_user_id, email, nickname, display_name, profile_image_url, role, last_login_at ) VALUES ( #{authProvider}, #{providerUserId}, #{email}, #{nickname}, #{displayName}, #{profileImageUrl}, #{role}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE app_user SET email = #{email}, nickname = #{nickname}, profile_image_url = #{profileImageUrl}, last_login_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE auth_provider = #{authProvider} AND provider_user_id = #{providerUserId}
